docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $735.00 FILED BY LAIKS, LEIANN AS TO DEFENDANT LIMO, CASPIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2012 BY VISITING JUDGE: LYNN O'MALLEY TAYLOR. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT IN OPEN COURT IN OPEN COURT, TO BE REC'D BY 2-10-12. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LIMO, CASPIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-11-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIMO, CASPIAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAIKS, LEIANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIMO, CASPIAN $510.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
REMARK: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON MAY 29, 2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
